duplicate: Already in your library — selected it instead.

slideshow.hint: Tap items to include in the slideshow.

err.libraryFull: Library full — delete some to add more.
err.uncompressible: Couldn't fit this image under the size limit — shrink it and try again.
err.duration: Video longer than 3:00 — trim it first (e.g. LosslessCut).
err.size: Video over the size limit — compress it (HandBrake / ffmpeg).
